> ## Second-brain bootstrap
> Before working in this repo, read **`~/context-os/playbook/root-knowledge-tree.md`** — the routing
> dispatcher for Edvin's knowledge (memories, playbooks, gathered substrate). Jump to the ONE domain
> tree your task maps to (≤2 hops, $0, no embedding). Rule: *reachable ≠ surfaced* — pull the slice your
> task names, never load everything. No route fits? Fallback: `/recall <query>` (semantic).
<!-- context-os:bootstrap:end -->
